category_sources: source_facts.description says backup directory tree and files; official DAR homepage says DAR is robust archiving and backup software.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is dar; official homepage expands DAR as Disk ARchive.
docs_sources: Official DAR building page documents source builds and repository use.
Official DAR documentation index links presentation, building, DAR documentation, libdar documentation, tutorial, and references.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official DAR building-from-sources page says DAR uses Git and instructs cloning https://github.com/Edrusb/DAR.git, with SourceForge remaining updated.
tags_sources: Official DAR homepage says it includes libdar and a command-line program for archiving and backup.
source_facts.description says backup directory tree and files and current_curation.tags includes cli.
